services.mediaPlacementDescription: Strategic placement of your advertisements across high-traffic locations
services.oohTransitDescription: Out-of-home transit advertising for maximum visibility and reach

services.description: We provide comprehensive advertising solutions to help your brand reach the right audience

hero.title: Revolutionize Your Brands with Glassbox avant-garde Advertising Solution
hero.subtitle: Capture Your Audience Everywhere They Go — From Retail, Public Transport, and Hospitality, Glassbox Delivers Impactful Advertising

audience.title: Connecting Your Brand to the Right Audience
audience.description: We help brands connect with their audiences through comprehensive advertising strategies backed by cutting-edge technology. With placements in strategic locations such as:

digitalSignage.title: Digital Signage
digitalSignage.description: Ideal for high-traffic areas, offering brands a powerful way to showcase their message with vivid visuals and real-time updates.

smartTV.title: Smart TV
smartTV.description: Provides a dual-purpose platform where ads can be seamlessly integrated into the viewing experience, ensuring high visibility without disrupting the audience.

tablets.title: Tablets
tablets.description: Facilitates personal engagement, allowing brands to create tailored experiences that encourage direct interaction and deeper connection with customers.

results.title: See How We Deliver Results
results.description: From concept to execution, our projects are crafted with precision, innovation, and a deep understanding of your audience

partners.title: Where Collaboration Meets Innovation
partners.description: Our partners trust us to deliver innovative advertising solutions that drive real results

cta.title: Elevate Your Brand Above the Noise

andriani.quote: With Glassbox, all promotional materials look very aesthetic and appealing to all guests, bringing the hotel's atmosphere to life.
andriani.author: Mrs. Andriani
andriani.position: Director of Sales & Marketing, Swiss-Belhotel Bogor

selo.quote: Glassbox has brought a new level of innovation to our campus. Their digital displays not only generate additional revenue but also give our space a futuristic look that aligns with the forward-thinking environment of our faculty. Their team has been incredibly professional and reliable throughout the partnership. A fantastic experience!
selo.author: Mr. Selo Sukardi
selo.position: Staff of Cooperation, Ventures, and Alumni Relations, Faculty of Mathematics and Natural Sciences, Universitas Indonesia

amy.quote: Partnering with Glassbox has greatly increased 3S's visibility, making it easier for clients and candidates to find us. The exposure in premium locations has boosted our engagement, and their professional support made the process seamless. Highly recommended!
amy.author: Amy Damayanti
amy.position: Operation Manager PT Sigma Solusi Servis

footer.tagline: Your Partner for Modern, Targeted Advertising Solutions.
